_description: Standing decisions log — append only. Log every architectural or process decision with reason and permanence.
_note: Never delete entries. Mark superseded decisions with status: superseded and point to successor.

decisions.decision: War room protocol adopted as standard for high-stakes architectural decisions
decisions.reason: Operation Context Lock validated that war room with domain characters produces better output than standard analysis — surfaced compound token cost problem and Delta fallback architecture not in original spec

decisions.decision: Config G Vector Memory RAG selected as context architecture
decisions.reason: Both Gemini war room (44/50) and pre-test analysis independently selected Echo. Implement after Mirofish confirms tonight.
decisions.note: Mirofish winner 80.4/100. Echo scored 56.8. Gap caused by CLAUDE.md token cost killing Echo Layer 1. RAG delivers 200 token overhead vs 2952. Hamilton fault tolerance addressed via Config B fallback when Ollama unavailable.

decisions.decision: A/B Vedic math test runs sequentially not in parallel
decisions.reason: Sequential gives clean isolated CPU and memory measurements. Parallel contaminates thermal and memory readings.

decisions.decision: CivitAI models referenced not downloaded until GPU upgrade complete
decisions.reason: HP Pavilion has integrated graphics only. SDXL requires 8GB VRAM minimum. RTX 3060 12GB upgrade required before local SD generation.

decisions.question: Eventually monetize this or keep it free/personal?
What geographic area to monitor â€” Tennessee local, Illinois local, or both?
decisions.answer: Tennessee all the time, Illinois when I tell you I am going back home

decisions.question: What categories do you want to monitor? (e.g. tools, electronics, collectibles, furniture, vintage)
decisions.answer: dismiss till I have a list or items I am looking for. Right now is garage sale season coming... I source more there during that season.. so later when I am looking I will set some up. New project is going to gather Facebook arbitrage... so that may make this further backseat

decisions.question: Minimum profit margin to include in digest â€” e.g. only show items with 40%+ margin?
decisions.answer: if it is at 40% it is plus 20-25% and fees/taxes so if we invest that much in one item, it has to have a high sell through rate

decisions.question: What defines NutriMind as complete â€” what is the finish line?
Should the game save state between sessions or reset each time?
After late-game is done â€” release publicly, keep personal, or productize?
decisions.answer: Need to setup miro fish to play rounds of games to play all aspects and give feedback to version 1.0 then use that feedback to keep applying logical updates. Then once social media is going, we can turn this over there to market and post and monitor statistics of game play

decisions.question: SRE WARNING — overnight job errors + dirty repos

decisions.decision: Upgraded all five named constraints (Shannon, Hamilton, Hopper, Kay, Codd) from behavioral guidelines to structurally enforced gates. Added Lovelace Rule (savepoint/variant test). Built constraint_gates.py utility and constraint_audit.py SRE scanner.
decisions.reason: Simulation data showed +14.3% avg quality improvement with positive enforcement vs negative-only. Codd alone +22.9%, Shannon +18.1%, Kay +15.1%. At 16-agent scale, behavioral-only constraints are aspirations not guarantees.
